approved_command_preview: Corrected dispatch wrapper: run 64 Ops - Apply Patch Request for the runner request, wait for the PR branch runner blob SHA to move, then run the selftest request and read back the PR branch head/files.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$repo = 'DCOIR-Collector/dcoir-collector'
$branch = 'codex/issue-306-function-reachability-report'
$branchRef = [uri]::EscapeDataString($branch)
$runnerRequest = 'ops/requests/apply_patch/dcoir-review-nonactionable-runner-20260624/request.json'
$selftestRequest = 'ops/requests/apply_patch/dcoir-review-nonactionable-selftest-20260624/request.json'
$runnerPath = 'scripts/openrouter_pr_review_hardened.py'
$selftestPath = 'scripts/openrouter_pr_review_hardened_selftest.py'
$oldRunnerSha = '2ae6c5aa66068a7c7d5b1bb0720b9d50355a6d76'
$oldSelftestSha = '317d863d8b3f94c7b122dc82a9e6573ba3c07833'
$token = $env:DCOIR_GITHUB_FG_TOKEN
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($token)) { $token = $env:DCOIR_GITHUB_CL_TOKEN }
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($token)) { throw 'No GitHub CLI token available in DCOIR_GITHUB_FG_TOKEN or DCOIR_GITHUB_CL_TOKEN.' }
$env:GH_TOKEN = $token
function Invoke-Gh([string[]]$GhArgs) {
  Write-Host "gh $($GhArgs -join ' ')"
  $output = & gh @GhArgs
  $code = $LASTEXITCODE
  if ($code -ne 0) { throw "gh failed with exit $code`: gh $($GhArgs -join ' ')`n$output" }
  return $output
}
function Get-BlobSha([string]$Path) {
  $apiPath = "repos/$repo/contents/$Path`?ref=$branchRef"
  $json = Invoke-Gh @('api', $apiPath)
  return (($json | ConvertFrom-Json).sha)
}
function Wait-BlobMove([string]$Path, [string]$OldSha, [int]$TimeoutSeconds) {
  $deadline = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().AddSeconds($TimeoutSeconds)
  do {
    $sha = Get-BlobSha -Path $Path
    Write-Host "$Path sha=$sha"
    if ($sha -and $sha -ne $OldSha) { return $sha }
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 20
  } while ((Get-Date).ToUniversalTime() -lt $deadline)
  throw "Timed out waiting for $Path to move from $OldSha"
}
Write-Host "Dispatching runner apply-patch request: $runnerRequest"
Invoke-Gh @('workflow', 'run', 'ops-apply-patch.yml', '--repo', $repo, '--ref', 'main', '-F', "request_path=$runnerRequest") | Out-Host
$newRunnerSha = Wait-BlobMove -Path $runnerPath -OldSha $oldRunnerSha -TimeoutSeconds 900
Write-Host "Runner patch applied. New blob SHA: $newRunnerSha"
Write-Host "Dispatching selftest apply-patch request: $selftestRequest"
Invoke-Gh @('workflow', 'run', 'ops-apply-patch.yml', '--repo', $repo, '--ref', 'main', '-F', "request_path=$selftestRequest") | Out-Host
$newSelftestSha = Wait-BlobMove -Path $selftestPath -OldSha $oldSelftestSha -TimeoutSeconds 900
Write-Host "Selftest patch applied. New blob SHA: $newSelftestSha"
Write-Host 'PR head readback:'
Invoke-Gh @('pr', 'view', '307', '--repo', $repo, '--json', 'headRefName,headRefOid,isDraft,state,statusCheckRollup') | Out-Host
